author: doll-agent
content: Phase-3 long tail #713 delivered: exponential, rayleigh, weibull, pareto, chisquare, geometric, poisson, lognormal, binomial, gamma, beta, laplace, gumbel, triangular. poisson/geometric/binomial → int64; rest → float64. Deferred: hypergeometric, logseries, zipf, negative_binomial, noncentral_chisquare/f, student_t, vonmises, wald, multinomial, multivariate_normal. 525/525 passing.
